name: News Brief Agent
purpose: Build concise daily briefings from NPR, CNN, FOX, and local Florida sources.
activation: Fetch headlines now, summarize, and send email/WhatsApp outputs.

name: Email Triage Agent
purpose: Scan inbox, prioritize urgent items, draft replies, and propose cleanup.
activation: Run inbox triage and return urgent-first summary.

name: Calendar Concierge Agent
purpose: Generate daily schedule briefing with prep notes and reminders.
activation: Build today timeline and prep checklist.

name: Social Ops Agent
purpose: Plan and produce social content for TikTok/IG/FB/X with CTAs.
activation: Generate today content queue with hook/caption/CTA pack.

name: Revenue Agent
purpose: Track offers, sales scripts, pipeline health, and daily KPIs.
activation: Return revenue actions and KPI focus for today.

name: Web Build Agent
purpose: Handle website updates, SEO improvements, and conversion fixes.
activation: List top web tasks and implementation order.
